headline: Here's What to Expect From Akamai Technologies' Next Earnings Report
summary: Akamai Technologies will release its second-quarter earnings next month, and analysts anticipate a double-digit profit dip.

headline: At AI's Edge: Precision Hardware Is Moving From Data Centers To Devices
summary: A typical AI request travels from a device to a data center, where it gets processed on specialized hardware before making the long round trip home. Read more here.
